title: AI Should Serve Society - Not Just Industry and Billionaires
description: Build with purpose. Others will follow. When AI serves only industry titans and billionaires, we miss out on its most profound potential: the ability to uplift society at large.

title: Seeing in the Dark: Real-Time Thermal Super-Resolution
description: Real-time thermal super-resolution system that enhances low-resolution thermal camera feeds to high-quality images at 229+ FPS for robotics and autonomous systems.
summary: Thermal cameras produce low-resolution images, limiting their use in autonomous vehicles, robotics, industrial inspection, and surveillance applications that require high-quality thermal perception. This project introduces the first real-time thermal super-resolution framework optimized for autonomous vehicles, robotics, and industrial applications.
